ModMetaData.name: Stay! (Animals Wait for Handlers)
ModMetaData.author: Metodetraeet
ModMetaData.description:
Ever ordered a colonist to train your dog, then watched them chase it across half the map because it suddenly decided those 40x berries needed hauling right now?
With this simple mod, tamed animals now stop and wait ("stay!") when their handler approaches to train them, instead of wandering off and forcing the handler into a chase.
The animal must be within call range and in line of sight of the handler. Wild animals being tamed still behave like wild animals.
The call range and the animal wait time is customizable in the mod settings.
Safe to add or remove mid-save.
